title: Infested Automaton
description:
There's a chamber filled with [red]dead robots[/red].

A lone automaton still has a [sine][aqua]faintly glowing core[/aqua][/sine] but it's engulfed by a grotesque, organic growth and doesn't respond.
notes:
Both options grant a random card from your character's card pool:
- [gold]Study[/gold] grants a random Power card
- [gold]Touch the Core[/gold] grants a random card with 0 canonical energy cost (excluding X-cost cards)
